HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Implementation of the 3D Green's Function class in a layered background. More...

Detailed Description

Implementation of the 3D Green's Function class in a layered background.

◆ dyadic()

cdyad dyadic ( const cvec & a,
const cvec & b )

Creates a dyadic product of two 3D vectors.

Parameters
aFirst vector.
bSecond vector.
Returns
Dyadic product as a cdyad (3x3 matrix).

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ generateUniformPoints()

std::vector< double > generateUniformPoints ( double minVal,
double maxVal,
int numPoints )

Generate uniformly spaced sample points in a 1D interval.

Parameters
minValLower bound of the interval.
maxValUpper bound of the interval.
numPointsNumber of points to generate (>=2 for valid spacing).
Returns
Vector of uniformly spaced values from minVal to maxVal (inclusive).

Computes evenly spaced samples using a fixed step size ( (maxVal - minVal) / (numPoints - 1) ).

Definition at line 3101 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ interMap()

void interMap ( )

Initialize the selector map for inter-layer coefficients.

Populates coeffSelectorInter with accessors keyed by terms: "te", "tm", "tez1", "tez2", "tmz1", "tmz2", "tezz", "tmzz", "tes", "tms", "ter", "tmr", "terz1", "terz2", "tmrz1", "tmrz2". Each accessor returns a reference to the corresponding interTuple stored inside a CoeffsInter.

Definition at line 195 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ intraMap()

void intraMap ( )

Initialize the selector map for intra-layer coefficients.

Populates coeffSelectorIntra with accessors keyed by terms: "te", "tm", "tez", "tmz", "tezz", "tmzz", "tes", "tms", "ter", "tmr", "terz", "tmrz". Each accessor returns a reference to the corresponding intraTuple stored inside a CoeffsIntra instance.

Definition at line 172 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ operator+()

std::map< std::string, dcmplx > operator+ ( std::map< std::string, dcmplx > lhs,
std::map< std::string, dcmplx > const & rhs )

Element-wise addition of two string–complex maps.

Parameters
lhsLeft-hand operand (copied before modification).
rhsRight-hand operand.
Returns
A map containing the sum of corresponding entries.

Missing keys in either map are treated as zero-valued.

Definition at line 20 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

◆ operator-()

std::map< std::string, dcmplx > operator- ( std::map< std::string, dcmplx > lhs,
std::map< std::string, dcmplx > const & rhs )

Element-wise subtraction of two string–complex maps.

Parameters
lhsLeft-hand operand (copied before modification).
rhsRight-hand operand.
Returns
A map containing the difference of corresponding entries.

Missing keys in either map are treated as zero-valued.

Definition at line 40 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

◆ operator/()

std::map< std::string, dcmplx > operator/ ( std::map< std::string, dcmplx > lhs,
double rhs )

Scalar division of all values in a string–complex map.

Parameters
lhsInput map (copied before division).
rhsScalar divisor.
Returns
A map whose values are divided by rhs.

Performs complex-by-real division for each element.

Definition at line 60 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

◆ rgrd2_eval_c()

void rgrd2_eval_c ( int mx,
int my,
const double * x,
const double * y,
const double * f_colmajor,
int m,
int n,
const double * xq,
const double * yq,
int method,
double * fq_out,
int * ier )

External REGRIDPACK routine for evaluating a 2D interpolation function.

Performs 2D interpolation of tabulated data f_colmajor over a grid defined by x and y, at query points ( xq, yq ).

Parameters
mxNumber of points along the x-direction of the input grid.
myNumber of points along the y-direction of the input grid.
xPointer to x-coordinates of the input grid (size mx).
yPointer to y-coordinates of the input grid (size my).
f_colmajorPointer to input function values in column-major order (size mx*my).
mNumber of query points along x.
nNumber of query points along y.
xqPointer to query x-coordinates (size m).
yqPointer to query y-coordinates (size n).
methodInterpolation method selector (e.g., 0 = bilinear, 1 = bicubic).
fq_outOutput array of interpolated values (size m*n).
ierOutput error flag (0 if successful).
Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ vecCrossDyad()

cdyad vecCrossDyad ( const cvec & v,
const cdyad & D,
bool rowWise = true )

Computes the cross product of a vector with each row or column of a dyad.

Parameters
vVector to be crossed.
DDyad (3x3 matrix).
rowWiseIf true, apply row-wise; if false, column-wise.
Returns
Resulting cdyad with cross products applied accordingly.

Variable Documentation

◆ coeffSelectorInter

std::map<std::string, std::function<interTuple&(CoeffsInter&)> > coeffSelectorInter

Selector map from inter-layer interaction key to tuple accessor.

Maps strings like "te", "tm", "tez1", "tmz2", ... to a lambda returning the matching interTuple inside a CoeffsInter object.

Definition at line 162 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

◆ coeffSelectorIntra

std::map<std::string, std::function<intraTuple&(CoeffsIntra&)> > coeffSelectorIntra

Selector map from intra-layer interaction key to tuple accessor.

Maps strings like "te", "tm", "tez", ... to a lambda returning the matching intraTuple inside a CoeffsIntra object.
